title: Digitaria eminens
taxonomy: Digitaria eminens is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae, which is commonly known as the true grasses or grass family. It is a type of annual or perennial grass native to tropical Africa. The classification of Digitaria eminens is further detailed within the genus Digitaria, which includes over 300 species of grasses. The Poaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes many economically important crops such as wheat, oats, and rice. As a member of this family, Digitaria eminens is closely related to other grasses in the genus Digitaria.
